# Copilot Instructions - bicepmodules

## Repository Purpose

Azure Bicep modules for infrastructure deployment.

## Code Patterns

- ✅ Each module is a standalone .bicep file
- ✅ Uses Azure Bicep syntax

## Quality Rules

- ✅ Validate with `az bicep build` before committing
- ✅ Use checkmarks in documentation, no AI language or em dashes
